body:
## Summary
Major polish pass across backend + frontend (~24 files, +444/-253 lines).

### Backend
- **Endless mode L11+**: boss.ts uses 1.06^L extrapolation for HP, +1/layer for ATK, tiered player HP 20→110
- **Skills only deduct energy on success**: SwapResult.replaced flag, actions.ts checks before deducting
- **Floor-10 cap removed**: rogue.js checkpointLayer → nextLayer for same-floor retry on failure
- **Save/restore**: startRogueGame no longer auto-restores (frontend controls via Continue button), restoreFromCheckpoint accepts buffs from payload
- **Unique buffs**: HP_BONUS, SKILL_ENERGY_MAX, HIGH_RANK_DRAW_ON_SHUFFLE filtered from upgrade pool after first pick
- **Skill warning**: socket event emitted on failed changeColor/changeCost

### Frontend  
- **Rogue save flow**: Continue/New Game modal on mount, Save&Exit / Exit without Saving confirm dialog
- **Victory flash fix**: winRevealUnlocked defaults to false
- **Exit buttons**: added to GamePage/RogueGamePage overlays and Rogue top bar  
- **Skill failure toast**: skillWarning rendered in GamePage + RogueGamePage
- **Shield cooldown CD badge**: animated pulse ring on shield slot
- **Hand sorting**: same-color grouped, high-to-low cost
- **Buff tags**: beside player avatar, color-coded, hover tooltip
- **Refresh token**: login returns refreshToken, 401 interceptor auto-refreshes
- **ChangeCost/Color panels**: card selector sorted by deck order
- **Full i18n**: all Chinese text → English (hand types, card names, UI labels, buff upgrades)

### Verification
- `tsc --noEmit`: zero errors
- Unit tests: 213/214 pass (1 pre-existing integration test failure)
- Tested in Docker with real game flow
title: feat: endless mode, buff persistence, i18n, UI fixes
